title: Dashboard
subtitle: This is the post-auth landing page of the boilerplate. Below is a tour of what's wired and where to look in the code.

auth.title: User management
auth.description: Promote / demote / ban users from the admin surface. Backed by Better Auth + a typed UserRepository.

admin.title: Admin dashboard
admin.description: Role-gated /admin layout with analytics charts and the user table. Gated by adminProcedure on the data side.

upload.title: File upload
upload.description: Multipart POST to /api/upload-file lands in R2 via a Workers binding and a typed BucketRepository.

effect.title: Effect TS in the wild
effect.description: Tagged errors, Effect.Service repos, and Effect.Schema validation — all surfaced through tRPC procedures.

account.title: Your session
account.description: Better Auth issued the cookie that's letting you read this page right now.
